title: James Evans (Welsh politician)
extract:
James Oswald David Evans is a Welsh Reform UK politician and farmer, who has served as a Member of the Senedd (MS) since the 2021 Senedd election, first for Brecon and Radnorshire and then, since 2026, for Brycheiniog Tawe Nedd. He also currently serves as Shadow Minister for Health, Prevention and Sport. 
Evans was a member of the Welsh Conservative Party until January 2026 and was the Shadow Cabinet Secretary for Health and Social Care from December 2024 to January 2026. In January 2026 he was expelled from the Conservative Party and joined Reform UK. He previously served as councillor for Gwernyfed ward on Powys County Council.
